bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent’s opening offer of all valueF is very poor for my preferences, and their message is cheap talk rather than evidence of a real constraint, so I will counter firmly with valid top values.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still the opening phase at t=0.02 and the opponent has not conceded at all, repeating the same all-F offer. Their aggressive messages are cheap talk, so I am making only a small non-repeating concession on issueC while holding firm on my most important issueA and other high-value positions.

I targeted a high-utility bid for myself because it is still very early (t=0.04) and the opponent has not shown meaningful concession; their latest offer is still extremely low utility to me. Their aggressive messages are cheap talk, so I am making only a modest non-repeated concession on issueC while holding firm on my highest-priority issueA and strong values elsewhere.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making a clearer concession than my last offer. The opponent has held almost entirely at valueF across issues and their messages are aggressive cheap talk, but their repeated bids suggest they may care about pushing issueC toward valueF; I will concede there while holding firm on my highest-weight issueA and strong values elsewhere.

At t=0.08 it is still early, so I am targeting a fairly high utility while avoiding simply repeating my prior pattern. The opponent has only slightly improved the utility of their offers to me and their aggressive messages are cheap talk, but their latest bid suggests interest around issueC=valueC and tougher positions on issueD, so I am conceding on issueC and partially on issueD while holding my highest-weight issueA and strong issueB.

I am targeting a still-strong early-game utility while making a visible concession on the issues the opponent explicitly emphasized, especially issueA and issueB. At t=0.10 there is no need to make deep concessions yet, and the opponent’s actual offers remain very low for my utility despite aggressive messages, so I will concede moderately without accepting their extreme positions.

I am targeting a utility around 0.70, which is a meaningful concession from my strongest bids while still preserving value early in the negotiation at t=0.12. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me and their messages are aggressive cheap talk, but their repeated pressure on issueA/issueB suggests I should show movement there without over-conceding my high-weight issueA. I also match their recent movement toward issueC:valueC while holding issueD at my best value for now.

I am targeting a still-strong early-game utility around 0.68, since time is only 0.14 and the opponent’s offers remain very low for me despite slight movement on issueA. Their messages complain especially about issueA and issueB, and their latest bid moved issueA from valueF toward valueD, so I will hold some ground on high-weight issueA while making a further concession on lower-weight issueB and keeping other terms favorable.

At t=0.16 it is still early, so I am targeting a relatively high utility while making a clearer concession than my prior bid. The opponent has held firm on issueB=valueF and often pushes low values on issueA/issueD, so I concede issueB to their repeated position while holding stronger ground on issueD and keeping issueA at a moderate concession.

I am targeting a utility around 0.64, which is still a meaningful concession from my best outcomes but not overly generous this early at t=0.18. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me and mostly anchored on valueF/valueE, so I treat the aggressive messages as pressure rather than evidence of a fair split; however, I keep a major concession on issueB and offer a non-repeated package while holding firmer on high-value issueA/issueD.

I am targeting a moderate concession around the low-0.5 utility range for me: still above the opponent’s latest offer to me, but a clear move from my prior position. At t=0.20 there is still time, so I am not matching their low-utility proposal outright; however, their repeated offers consistently emphasize issueB=valueF, issueC=valueC/F, and issueD=valueF/E, so I am conceding on B, C, and D while holding issueA closer to my preference because it is my highest-weight issue.

I am targeting a utility around 0.405, which is a substantial concession but still above reservation and matches a bid the opponent has already revealed they are willing to put forward. At t=0.22 there is still time, but the opponent has been holding firm with only small concessions, and their messages consistently emphasize issueA, so I am conceding issueA while keeping the bid within valid domain values.
